<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-cṳ̄ (găng-ciĕ)]][[de:Wasser-Ratte]][[fr:Rat d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Ngìm-chṳ́]][[ja:壬子]][[ko:임자]][[vi:Nhâm Tý]][[za:Nyaemzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-chú]][[zh-yue:壬子]][[zh:壬子]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-cṳ̄ (găng-ciĕ)]][[de:Wasser-Ratte]][[fr:Rat d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Ngìm-chṳ́]][[ja:壬子]][[ko:임자]][[vi:Nhâm Tý]][[za:Nyaemzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-chú]][[zh-yue:壬子]][[zh:壬子]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-cṳ̄ (găng-ciĕ)]][[de:Wasser-Ratte]][[fr:Rat d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Ngìm-chṳ́]][[ja:壬子]][[ko:임자]][[vi:Nhâm Tý]][[za:Nyaemzceij]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-chú]][[zh-yue:壬子]][[zh:壬子]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Rat|kanji=壬子|romaji=mizunoe nezumi|onyomi=jinshi|p=rénzǐ|w=jen-tzŭ|mi=ʐən³⁵ tsɨ|y=jam4 zi2|j=jam4 zi2|ci=jɐm tsi|mc=ɲiɪm tsi|oc-bs=ɲɨm tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Water Rat also known as 壬子''' (mizu no ene, jinsui no nezumi, jinsui no ne, jinshi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 49th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guichuu|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water (wuxing)|en|Water (wuxing)|WD=Q1400698|lt=lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat|1=Rat (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Water (wuxing)|en|Water (wuxing)|WD=Q1400698|lt=lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|Water (水)}}, resulting in a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|lt=Hiwa|lt_ja=比和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}).  
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Rat (壬子)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénzǐ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: jinshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imja (임자)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tý

<!--
==
* Yang Water Rat (壬子) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénzǐ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのえね (mizunoe-ne)
***Onyomi: じんかのね (jinka-no-ne)
***Onyomi: じんし (jinshi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): imja
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Tý

-->
==Years of Yang Water Rat==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 52 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 52|en|AD 52|WD=Q30390|lt=52 AD|1=AD 52}}
* {{ill|AD 112|en|AD 112|WD=Q24970|lt=112 AD|1=AD 112}}
* {{ill|172|en|172|WD=Q31296|lt=172 AD|1=172}}
* {{ill|232|en|232|WD=Q30569|lt=232 AD|1=232}}
* {{ill|292|en|292|WD=Q32132|lt=292 AD|1=292}}
* {{ill|352|en|352|WD=Q33579|lt=352 AD|1=352}}
* {{ill|412|en|412|WD=Q32767|lt=412 AD|1=412}}
* {{ill|472|en|472|WD=Q31853|lt=472 AD|1=472}}
* {{ill|532|en|532|WD=Q30393|lt=532 AD|1=532}}
* {{ill|592|en|592|WD=Q32774|lt=592 AD|1=592}}
* {{ill|652|en|652|WD=Q31104|lt=652 AD|1=652}}
* {{ill|712|en|712|WD=Q23521|lt=712 AD|1=712}}
* {{ill|772|en|772|WD=Q30729|lt=772 AD|1=772}}
* {{ill|832|en|832|WD=Q23900|lt=832 AD|1=832}}
* {{ill|892|en|892|WD=Q30593|lt=892 AD|1=892}}
* {{ill|952|en|952|WD=Q30175|lt=952 AD|1=952}}
| 
* {{ill|1012|en|1012|WD=Q19239|lt=1012 AD|1=1012}}
* {{ill|1072|en|1072|WD=Q19435|lt=1072 AD|1=1072}}
* {{ill|1132|en|1132|WD=Q19582|lt=1132 AD|1=1132}}
* {{ill|1192|en|1192|WD=Q19739|lt=1192 AD|1=1192}}
* {{ill|1252|en|1252|WD=Q5497|lt=1252 AD|1=1252}}
* {{ill|1312|en|1312|WD=Q5734|lt=1312 AD|1=1312}}
* {{ill|1372|en|1372|WD=Q6258|lt=1372 AD|1=1372}}
* {{ill|1432|en|1432|WD=Q6349|lt=1432 AD|1=1432}}
* {{ill|1492|en|1492|WD=Q6679|lt=1492 AD|1=1492}}
* {{ill|1552|en|1552|WD=Q6565|lt=1552 AD|1=1552}}
* {{ill|1612|en|1612|WD=Q6771|lt=1612 AD|1=1612}}
* {{ill|1672|en|1672|WD=Q7614|lt=1672 AD|1=1672}}
* {{ill|1732|en|1732|WD=Q6966|lt=1732 AD|1=1732}}
* {{ill|1792|en|1792|WD=Q7805|lt=1792 AD|1=1792}}
* {{ill|1852|en|1852|WD=Q7661|lt=1852 AD|1=1852}}
* {{ill|1912|en|1912|WD=Q2077|lt=1912 AD|1=1912}}
* {{ill|1972|en|1972|WD=Q2476|lt=1972 AD|1=1972}}
| 
* {{ill|2032 AD|ja|2032年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2032|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2032 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2092 AD|ja|2092年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2092|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2092 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2090年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2152 AD|ja|2152年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2152|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2152 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2212 AD|ja|2212年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2212|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2212 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2272 AD|ja|2272年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2272|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2272 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2332 AD|ja|2332年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2332|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2332 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2392 AD|ja|2392年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2392|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2392 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2452 AD|ja|2452年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2452|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2452 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2512 AD|ja|2512年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2512|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2512 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2572 AD|ja|2572年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2572|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2572 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2632 AD|ja|2632年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2632|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2632 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2692 AD|ja|2692年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2692|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2692 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2752 AD|ja|2752年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2752|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2752 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2812 AD|ja|2812年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2812|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2812 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2872 AD|ja|2872年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2872|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2872 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2932 AD|ja|2932年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2932|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2932 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2992 AD|ja|2992年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2992|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2992 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Water Rat==
Because the water element is duplicated, a superstition arose that while many fires occur in {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} years, many water disasters ({{ill|Water disaster|ja|水害|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water disaster|1=water-related disaster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11252966}}) occur in {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} years. In the late Edo period, {{ill|Takizawa Bakin|en|Takizawa Bakin|WD=Q463142|lt=Kyokutei Bakin|1=Takizawa Bakin}} remarked, "If it is so with a Besshi year, then in a Jinshi year the double presence of water elements will surely bring about a great flood."

However, the superstition that "men born in a Jinshi year have weak constitutions" did not spread; for instance, in {{ill|1972|en|1972|WD=Q2476|lt=1972 AD|1=1972}} (Shōwa 47), nearly 2 million births occurred during a Jinshi year as part of the second {{ill|Baby boom|en|Baby boom|WD=Q610548|lt=Baby Boom|1=Baby boom}}, and there are no recorded instances from {{ill|1852|en|1852|WD=Q7661|lt=1852 AD|1=1852}} (Kaei 5) or {{ill|1912|en|1912|WD=Q2077|lt=1912 AD|1=1912}} (Meiji 45/Taishō 1) of men being unable to marry due to being born in a Jinshi year.

==Days of Yang Water Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Yang Water Rat (壬子)'s Days==
==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=}} is the 1st day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

==See Also==
* {{ill|1852 AD#Birth|ja|1852nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1852 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|1912 AD#Birth|ja|1912nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1912 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|1972 AD#Birth|ja|1972nd year #誕生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1972 AD#Birth|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Pêng-chún]]
[[zh-yue:丙辰]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Water Rat|qq=ja|壬子|qq=Yang Water Rat|qq=ja|qq=壬子|qq=zh|qq=壬子|qq=ko|qq=임자|lt_ko=임자|qq=fr|qq=Rat de eau|qq=de|qq=Wasser-Ratte|qq=en|qq=simple|qq=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|version=84123842|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Bîng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Metall-Drachteen]]
[[de:Yang Water Rat]]

[[ja:壬子]]

[[zh:壬子]]
[[ko:임자]]
[[fr:Rat de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Ratte]]
[[af:Metaaldraak (astrologie)]]
[[de:Metall-Drachteen]]
[[en:Metal Dragon]]
[[fr:Dragon de métalboishak]]
[[it:Bing-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:병진]]
[[vi:Bính Thìn]]
[[za:Bingceij]]
[[zh:丙辰]]
[[ar:Yang Water Rat]]

<!--Yang Water Rat-->


<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Waterrot (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Ìng-cṳ̄ (găng-ciĕ)]]
[[fr:Rat d'eau (astrologie)]]
[[hak:Ngìm-chṳ́]]
[[vi:Nhâm Tý]]
[[za:Nyaemzceij]]
[[zh-min-nan:Jîm-chú]]
[[zh-yue:壬子]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Waterrot (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Ìng-cṳ̄ (găng-ciĕ)]]
[[fr:Rat d'eau (astrologie)]]
[[hak:Ngìm-chṳ́]]
[[vi:Nhâm Tý]]
[[za:Nyaemzceij]]
[[zh-min-nan:Jîm-chú]]
[[zh-yue:壬子]]
{{wikidata link|Q904972}}
[[Category:East Asian folk religion]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
